petrov_stage: Move the same sentence logic into time, dates, and calendar talk.
petrov_mission: Say a date, weekday, and birthday-style calendar line without reading.
focus_targets: Tens are built with numeral plus 十
Weekdays use 星期 plus a number

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 二十, 三十, 四十, 五十.
Listen to a line that uses Tens are built with numeral plus 十 and Months are number plus 月 and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 二十, 三十, 四十, 五十.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Tens are built with numeral plus 十 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Say a date, weekday, and birthday-style calendar line without reading.
Say in Chinese: What month and what date is it?

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 二十, 三十, 四十, 五十, 六十.
Translate into Chinese: See you tomorrow.
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 二十, 三十, 四十.
Produces one correct spoken line using Tens are built with numeral plus 十.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
